prompt: I'm starting a brand new repo from scratch. I need a monorepo with two microservices: 'notifications' and 'users'. Notifications entity: recipientId, channel [email|sms], message, status [pending|sent|failed]. Users entity: email, name, role [admin|member|guest], status [active|inactive]. Each service needs create, get, and delete use cases. Set up the full monorepo structure with root package.json workspaces, docker-compose.yml, and scaffold both services with hexagonal architecture. Postgres write + MongoDB read, Redis, Kafka, OpenTelemetry.

assertions.name: root-workspace-config
assertions.description: Root package.json includes workspaces pointing to services/*

assertions.name: both-services-scaffolded
assertions.description: Both notifications and users services are fully scaffolded

assertions.name: structural-symmetry
assertions.description: Both services have identical folder structures

assertions.name: docker-compose-includes-all-infra
assertions.description: docker-compose.yml includes postgres, mongodb, redis, kafka, and opentelemetry

assertions.name: no-process-env-outside-config
assertions.description: process.env is only accessed inside infrastructure/config.ts
